zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide de Normandie於大約1029年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉時，她的父親Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie30歲，母親Heveleve Of Falaise27歲。她於1048年與Enguerrand II de Ponthieu結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1082年在法國諾門迪享年54歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaide de Normandie于大约1029年出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯法拉时，她的父亲Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie30岁，母亲Heveleve Of Falaise27岁。她于1048年与Enguerrand II de Ponthieu结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1082年在法国諾門迪享年54岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Normandie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

variants.name: Normand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Pierre, Amie, Donat, Emile, Herve, Jacques, Jean Noel, Jean-Michel.
French and Breton (mainly Finistère; also Le Normand): habitational name for someone from Normandy, a region in northern France (see Norman ). Compare Lenormand .

variants.name: Normandy
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide de Normandie was born about 1029, in Falaise, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie, was 30 and her mother, Heveleve Of Falaise, was 27. She married Enguerrand II de Ponthieu in 1048. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1082, in Normandy, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide de Normandie est née environ 1029, à Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Heveleve Of Falaise, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Enguerrand II de Ponthieu en 1048. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1082, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide de Normandie um 1029 in Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie 30 und ihre Mutter Heveleve Of Falaise 27. Sie hat 1048 Enguerrand II de Ponthieu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1082 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Normandie è nata il circa 1029 nel Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Heveleve Of Falaise, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Enguerrand II de Ponthieu nel 1048. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1082, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Normandieが約1029年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスファレイゼで生まれた時，父Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandieは30歳，母Heveleve Of Falaiseは27歳であった。1048年にEnguerrand II de Ponthieuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1082年にフランスノーマンディで54歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアウマルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide de Normandie(이)가 대략 1029년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 팔레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Heveleve Of Falaise(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1048년 Enguerrand II de Ponthieu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1082년 프랑스 노먼디에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 오마일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide de Normandie nasceu aproximadamente 1029, em Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Heveleve Of Falaise, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Enguerrand II de Ponthieu em 1048. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1082, em Normandie, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide de Normandie родилась около 1029 г. в местности фалеис, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Heveleve Of Falaise, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Enguerrand II de Ponthieu в 1048 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1082 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности аумеил, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

sm.from 1000 to 1035: mai le 1000 e o'o I le 1035

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelaide de Normandie nació aproximadamente 1029, en Falaise, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert Ier 'le Magnifique' duc de Normandie, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Heveleve Of Falaise, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Enguerrand II de Ponthieu en 1048. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1082, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
